name: legal-intelligence
description: Production multi-agent LangGraph system with critic peer review and supervisor revision loops

agents.role: Validates and structures case filing inputs
Retrieves CAP precedents; expands on critic feedback during revisions
Analyzes holdings, win rates, and distinguishing factors
Estimates likely judgment scenarios with confidence bands
Win strategies; incorporates critique on revision passes
Assembles draft filing package and pre-filing checklist
Peer review with quality score and rewrite recommendations
Approve/revise gate with max-revision safeguard and final report
